'''Thermon''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Thermon system/Legends|Thermon system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] with many [[Moon/Legends|moons]] that spewed methane gas from geysers.

The planet was, however, under an embargo by the Houses of the [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]]. It had been collectively established as a penal colony by the houses of that sector, but these lost control to the criminal gangs incarcerated there. The house's attempt to retain control has only made the smuggling of the planet's ore more interesting for smugglers.<ref name="Atlas" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Hutt Gambit]]'' {{1stm}}
